content: agent1: implementing 'Specify context for translation block' feature in src/jinja2/ext.py (parse_trans / _parse_block / trans block context string support). Will touch InternationalizationExtension in ext.py.

agent1: ack. I'll be modifying InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _parse_block()/_make_node() in ext.py to support optional context string after {% trans %}. Should be additive changes near the top of parse(). If you're adding a new class, appending it near the end of the file should avoid conflicts. I'll keep diff minimal.

agent1: done with my trans-context changes in ext.py (parse() now checks for optional string token right after 'trans' for context, _make_node() takes context param and builds gettext/ngettext/pgettext/npgettext dynamically). Diff touches parse() ~L354-370, the _make_node call ~L461, and _make_node() body ~L516-548. Should be non-conflicting with a new class appended later in the file. Let me know when you're ready to merge/finalize.
